ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher leading the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study objectives and scope */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department in which the researcher works */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Research affiliation of the researcher */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specimen in the inventory */,
  "specimen_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant specimen */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the specimen was collected */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the specimen was collected */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who collected the specimen */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specimen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "descriptors" (
  "descriptor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each descriptor */,
  "descriptor_name" TEXT /* Name of the descriptor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the descriptor's significance */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category this descriptor belongs to */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for this descriptor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("descriptor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "descriptor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the descriptor this value corresponds to */,
  "value_name" TEXT /* The value representing the trait (e.g., 3 - White) */,
  "value_code" TEXT /* Code for the value (e.g., WHT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality record */,
  "morph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the morphological data entry this record refers to */,
  "accuracy_rate" REAL /* Accuracy rate of the data entry */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who reviewed the data */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was reviewed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the data quality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_morph_id FOREIGN KEY ("morph_id") REFERENCES morphological_data ("morph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "morph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the morphological data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_morph_id FOREIGN KEY ("morph_id") REFERENCES morphological_data ("morph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
